title: thelypteris santomasii
intro: Thelypteris santomasii, also known as the Santomas fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Thelypteris genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris santomasii include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Thelypteris santomasii is often prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and infusions in combination with other herbs, which can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or applied topically as creams or ointments.
